briefdescription.para: This table contains the values to be programmed to ONSEMI device.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Device Type 2) Register Address 3) Values

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_Init

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
is the revision number of the ONSEMI device.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M Device Revision Number.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsFRL, u64 LineRate, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: ONSEMI_NB7NQ621M_LineRateReconfig

briefdescription.para: This function reconfigures the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M cable redriver.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
is the revision number of the ONSEMI device.
specifies if the mode is FRL or TMDS.
specifies the linerate.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function prints out all the contents from OnsemiRegisterFields array.
This function displays a registerdump of the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
